历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 770 → 798 → 734 → 412 → 302, showing a clear upward trend (ranking numbers continuously decreasing), with a cumulative advance of about 432 places in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 302, indicating intensifying competition year by year. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 53 in 2021, 103 in 2022, 7 in 2023 (abnormally low data), 77 in 2024, and 77 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 86, an increase of about 11.7% compared to 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for 6 consecutive years (Top 4), belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (relatively high number of retractions) and campus safety incidents, which may have a minor negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. It has 28 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including 8 A+ disciplines: Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Business Administration, and Management Science and Engineering, demonstrating top-tier academic strength nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine are consistently highly recommended, closely aligning with SJTU's advantageous disciplines. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Hubei for 2026 is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from the combined total of about 391,200 for Physics and History categories in 2025, leading to a small rise in the competition base. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai (a municipality directly under the central government), representing cross-province application for Hubei candidates. The university's total national enrollment number.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuously advancing rankings (intensifying competition), the alleviating effect of an approximately 11.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the slight cooling effect from a negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 302. The expansion alleviates some competitive pressure, but the strong upward trend in rankings suggests a minimum ranking of approximately 323 for 2026, with a range of 273–373.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 270 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, IEEE Pilot Class, Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class); candidates with rankings between 300–350 focus on Tier 2 majors (Engineering Information Class, Integrated Circuit Talent Class, Finance Dual Degree, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings above 350 mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net, while also trying some Tier 2 majors. SJTU's Engineering Experimental Class adopts broad enrollment, allowing分流 to popular directions after enrollment, which is worth attention.

The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 56, indicating extremely intense and intensifying competition. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 1 person each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan is 3 persons, a 200% increase from 2025 (from 1 to 3), which significantly alleviates competition.

专业热度与地域.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, which is an inter-provincial application for Hubei candidates. The university's total national enrollment number. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous upward movement in historical rankings, the significant alleviation effect of expanding the History Category plan from 1 to 3 persons (a 200% increase) in 2026, and the slight cooling effect of a negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 56. Given the extremely small base of History Category enrollment (from 1 to 3), the absolute number after expansion remains very small, and competition for SJTU in Hubei History Category is extremely intense (around the top 60 in the province). After moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 103, with a range of 53–153.
